subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i- 'Alí-Akbar: May thou be engaged, God willing, in the remembrance and praise of the True One, exalted be His glory, and in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا علی اکبر انشاء الله بذکر و ثنای حق جل جلاله ناطق باشید و بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wisdom [hikmat]
